title: Spiti Valley Adventure
description: A high-altitude Spiti circuit built for travelers who want remote landscapes, clean route planning, and flexible package choices.
about: This fallback Spiti listing keeps the website usable even when the database is not connected. It covers the core Spiti experience with multiple package formats linked to the itinerary PDFs already bundled in the backend.
bestFor: Travelers looking for a Himalayan group departure
People comparing full, short, 4x4, and biking Spiti variants
Solo travelers and small groups who want assisted planning
highlights: Multiple Spiti package variants in one trip page
PDF itineraries already available for each package
Great backup listing while final media is still being added

itinerary.title: Departure and route briefing
itinerary.description: Board for the mountains and begin the journey with clear coordination before the main circuit starts.

itinerary.title: Kinnaur side transit
itinerary.description: Move through the scenic approach side of the route and gradually settle into the altitude.

itinerary.title: Kaza base and exploration
itinerary.description: Use Kaza as the core base for village visits, viewpoints, and the classic Spiti atmosphere.

itinerary.title: Chandratal and return
itinerary.description: Wrap the circuit with the signature lake-and-camp stretch before heading back.

inclusions: Stay plan based on the selected package
Package-specific meals as listed in the PDF
exclusions: Travel to the first reporting point
Personal purchases, snacks, and add-on activities
Anything not specifically listed in the selected package

faqs.question: Can I compare multiple Spiti packages on one page?
faqs.answer: Yes. This trip includes multiple package variants so travelers can compare them easily.

faqs.question: Are the itinerary PDFs available right now?
faqs.answer: Yes. The bundled PDFs are already served from the backend public folder.
